task_completion.description: Verify that a new item of type 'Report' has been created in Juris-M.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M application, the right-hand info pane shows 'Item Type' set to 'Report'.

task_completion.description: Verify the title is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the right-hand pane contains exactly 'Supreme Court Appointment Process: President's Selection of a Nominee'.

task_completion.description: Verify the author is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Author' field shows 'McMillion' in the last name box and 'Barry J.' in the first name box.

task_completion.description: Verify the Report Number and Institution are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Report Number' field shows 'R44235' and the 'Institution' field shows 'Congressional Research Service'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Date and Place are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date' field shows '2022' and the 'Place' field shows 'Washington, D.C.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the URL and Abstract are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'URL' field contains 'https://crsreports.congress.gov/product/pdf/R/R44235' and the 'Abstract' field contains 'The appointment of a Supreme Court Justice is an event of major significance in American politics.'

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Juris-M graphical user interface to create the item.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Juris-M application window with the item details being entered in the right-hand pane, rather than a text editor or script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands, python scripts, or API calls modifying the Juris-M database directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the appropriate Juris-M fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is visible inside the actual input fields of the Juris-M application's info pane, not pasted as a single block of text into a generic notes field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The expected title is 'Supreme Court Appointment Process: President's Selection of a Nominee'. The expected report number is 'R44235'. The expected institution is 'Congressional Research Service'. The expected author's last name is 'McMillion'.
